creator: mkrzewicki@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kajetan Staszkiewicz from comment #2)
That looks like quite a patch, not sure if I'm brave enough (as in: have no time to play with this that much). I might try it some time.
It is great to see that there is some activity around pf though. What is the future of this patch? Looks like it might, in some form, be incorporated into some mainline - 15? Or is a backport to 14 also realistic? I mean I have read discussions about newer openbsd code/syntax/features not really being considered...
thanks,
